warnings.interpretation: historical report fixture residue, not controlled runner behavior
optional sibling warnings do not affect the DevCockpitCore C3 command set

evidence: c3_second_command_hardening.v1 records accepted_hardened with 18/18 invariants passing
controlled_runner_probe ALLOWED_COMMAND_KEYS is exactly status_snapshot_help and adapters_validate_help
C4, C5, and C6 remain locked

required_preconditions: separate Supervisor prompt explicitly opens C4 design-only work
C3 command set remains frozen at exactly two command keys
design work defines scope, non-goals, stop conditions, and validation evidence before implementation
risks: C4 design-only could be misread as implementation approval
future work could blur C3 command expansion with C4 design
ordinary adapter validation evidence must remain outside controlled_runner_probe

controlled-runner-stop.meaning: stop with hardened C3 command set accepted and no further capability work

c3-command-set-freeze.meaning: freeze the current two-command C3 surface without opening C4

c4-scoped-runner-design-only.meaning: open a future C4 design-only slice with implementation forbidden

c3-followup-fix-v1.meaning: return to C3 only if a material C3 issue appears

recommended_decision.rationale: The hardened C3 command set has no current blockers, so the next useful route is a separate C4 design-only prompt while implementation remains forbidden.

exact_two_command_keys.summary: production command keys are exactly status_snapshot_help and adapters_validate_help

no_third_command.summary: no third C3 command is present or recommended

help_only_boundary.summary: both accepted C3 commands are fixed help/readback probes

c4_c5_c6_locked.summary: C4 implementation, C5, and C6 remain locked

no_generalized_runner.summary: no generalized runner or config command registry is present

no_scheduler.summary: no scheduler or autonomy loop is present
